---
title: "Talk at SIAM Conference on Optimization"
date: "2026-06-02"
categories: [talks, conferences]
description: "Presenting at the SIAM Conference on Optimization at the University of Edinburgh."
---
Presenting *Nonsmooth Riemannian Optimization with Inexact Manifold Primitives via Bundle Methods* at the SIAM Conference on Optimization (OP26) at the University of Edinburgh.
